title: 书名
subtitle: 副标题或类型卖点，可为空
author: Arthur 著
genre: 作品类型，例如 Chinese historical war fiction / social suspense thriller / contemporary coming-of-age fiction
mood: 情绪关键词，例如 solemn, epic, tragic, heroic
core_visual: 一个核心视觉，不要堆砌：例如 Yellow River frontier fortress under siege, ancient cavalry silhouettes, torn banners
composition: portrait book cover, centered composition, title-safe empty space at top and bottom
palette: 色彩方案，例如 deep bronze, ink black, muted gold, dark red
avoid: no readable text, no fake letters, no watermark, no logo
positive_prompt: Book cover, premium novel cover artwork, ... no readable text, no fake letters, no watermark, no logo
